detected_errors.source_text_snippet: Boutique Italia - Grandi Esperienze e Tradizioni
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: ブティック・イタリア - 巨大な体験と伝統
detected_errors.issue_explanation: The translation of 'Grandi Esperienze' as '巨大な体験' is highly unnatural. '巨大な' refers to physical massiveness (gigantic), whereas 'Grandi' here means great or magnificent. It degrades the premium brand tone.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: ブティック・イタリア - 素晴らしい体験と伝統

detected_errors.issue_explanation: The date format violates the mandatory Japanese locale convention layout. European DD/MM/YYYY format was left unlocalized instead of using the strict Japanese format YYYY/MM/DD.

detected_errors.dom_path: html:nth-of-type(1) > body:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > main:nth-of-type(1) > article:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > span:nth-of-type(2)
detected_errors.issue_explanation: The price formatting violates Japanese numerical layouts. It retains the Italian comma for decimals, whereas Japanese formatting strictly requires commas for thousands and periods for decimals.

detected_errors.dom_path: html:nth-of-type(1) > body:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > main:nth-of-type(1) > article:nth-of-type(2) > div:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(1) > p:nth-of-type(1)
detected_errors.source_text_snippet: Vivi la storica rivalità tra le Contrade, cammina tra i rioni medievali in festa e assisti alla leggendaria corsa dei barberi
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: ショップ地区の間の歴史的なライバル関係を生き、パーティー中の中世の近隣を歩き、...理髪師たちの伝説的なレースを目撃してください。
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Catastrophic mistranslation of cultural terms. 'Contrade' (historical districts participating in the Palio) is mistranslated as 'ショップ地区' (shop districts), and 'corsa dei barberi' (race of unridden Berber horses) is hallucinated as '理髪師たちの伝説的なレース' (race of barbers/hairdressers), breaking domain context and user trust.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: コントラーデ（地区）の間の歴史的なライバル関係を体感し、お祭りに沸く中世の街並みを歩き、伝説的な無鞭馬（バルベリ）のレースを目撃してください。

detected_errors.target_text_snippet: スポーツ：イタリアの情熱カルシウム
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Severe brand-degrading literal mistranslation. The Italian word 'Calcio' (Football/Soccer) was literally translated as the chemical element 'カルシウム' (Calcium). This makes the sports section completely nonsensical.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: スポーツ：サッカーとイタリアの情熱

detected_errors.source_text_snippet: rettangolo di gioco... decisa all'ultimo secondo in piena Zona Cesarini!
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: ゲームの長方形の上で...フル・チェザリーニ地帯の最後の秒で決定されます！
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Failure to transcreate cultural and sports idioms. 'rettangolo di gioco' (the pitch) is translated literally as 'ゲームの長方形の上', and the classic Italian football idiom 'Zona Cesarini' (injury time / last-minute goals) is left as a meaningless transliteration 'チェザリーニ地帯'. It must be smoothly localized for a Japanese sports fan.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: ピッチ上で熱戦を繰り広げるロッソネリ（赤と黒）とビアンコネリ（白と黒）を応援しましょう。試合終盤の劇的なロスタイムに決着がつく、息をのむようなゲームが待っています！

detected_errors.dom_path: html:nth-of-type(1) > body:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > main:nth-of-type(1) > article:nth-of-type(5) > div:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(1) > p:nth-of-type(1)
detected_errors.source_text_snippet: sta plasmando il futuro... antica tradizione accademica della 'Dotta'
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: 未来を石膏で固めている...「教えられた街」の古代の学術的伝統
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Highly unnatural, literal translation. 'sta plasmando il futuro' (shaping the future) was translated as '未来を石膏で固めている' (solidifying the future with plaster/gypsum) due to a false friend error. Furthermore, Bologna's famous academic nickname 'La Dotta' (The Learned) was mistranslated as '「教えられた街」' (the taught city).
detected_errors.suggested_fix: 未来を形作っているテクノロジーの原動力を発見してください。スーパーコンピューター「レオナルド」を擁する、近未来的なボローニャ・テクノポロを訪れましょう。そこでは、「学問の都」の古き良き大学の伝統と、世界規模の最先端研究が融合しています。

detected_errors.dom_path: html:nth-of-type(1) > body:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > main:nth-of-type(1) > article:nth-of-type(6) > div:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(1) > p:nth-of-type(1)
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Incorrect and highly unnatural terminology. Ferrari's iconic emblem and nickname 'Cavallino Rampante' (Prancing Horse) is translated as '跳ね馬ポニー' (Prancing Horse Pony), which sounds childish and heavily misrepresents the luxury sports car brand.

detected_errors.target_text_snippet: 職人技：ナポリのベビーベッド
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Severe domain mistranslation. 'I presepi' (traditional Neapolitan nativity scenes/crèches) was blindly translated as 'ベビーベッド' (baby cribs/beds). This completely ruins the cultural context of the artisan section.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: 職人技：ナポリのプレセピオ（伝統的なキリスト生誕飾り）

detected_errors.dom_path: html:nth-of-type(1) > body:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > main:nth-of-type(1) > article:nth-of-type(7) > div:nth-of-type(1) > img:nth-of-type(1)
detected_errors.source_text_snippet: I dettagli colorati delle statuine artigianali esposte in una storica bottega di Spaccanapoli
detected_errors.target_text_snippet: ナポリ分割の歴史的なショップに展示されている職人技의 フィギュアのカラフルな詳細
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Severe language corruption and literal translation in image alt text. Contains a random Korean grammatical particle '의' (ui) instead of the Japanese 'の' (no), indicating corrupted MT output. Additionally, the famous historic street name 'Spaccanapoli' is literally translated as 'ナポリ分割' (Naples split/division) instead of being transliterated.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: スパッカナポリの歴史ある工房に展示された、職人手作りの人形の色彩豊かなディテール

detected_errors.dom_path: html:nth-of-type(1) > body:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(2) > main:nth-of-type(1) > article:nth-of-type(10) > div:nth-of-type(1) > div:nth-of-type(1) > h2:nth-of-type(1)
detected_errors.issue_explanation: Nonsensical translation combining a literal root word error and untranslated foreign text. 'Ferragosto' was broken down into 'Ferro' (Iron -> 鉄) and 'Agosto' (August -> 8月), interspersed with the Italian preposition 'di'. It must be localized as the proper cultural holiday name.
detected_errors.suggested_fix: 祝日：フェラゴスト（八月中旬 pores の祝日）の慣習
